title: (Bullish Signal) CRSP, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling CRSP's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 44 similar cases where CRSP's MACD histogram became positive, and 33 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 75%. Current price $116.06 crossed the resistance line at $119.72 and is trading between $119.72 resistance and $97.05 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/20/21 - 05/20/21, the price experienced a -3% Downtrend, while the week of 05/13/21 - 05/20/21 shows a +16% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/6raxx2guuh071.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=abdc1f0d181315fe92ef9bba6b120853b0629247

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where CRSP's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 18 of 22 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for CRSP just turned positive on May 20, 2021. Looking at past instances where CRSP's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 33 of 44 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

Following a +5.64% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where CRSP advanced for three days, in 265 of 310 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 163 of 203 cases where CRSP Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 80%.
